name: Ping Pong
current_goal: Maintain the single-node intranet speed-test service at app version 0.3.1 with browser-scoped Recent Results, fixed homepage Quick 30s and Full 45s modes, proportional startup trimming, Raw CV and Stable CV throughput diagnostics, IQR kept/outlier-rate card diagnostics, current-run Raw Data popup/CSV diagnostics, a topbar English speed-test guide dialog, stability-first completion summaries graded on Stable CV with loosened IQR outlier thresholds, hotspot data-plan warning, required per-test Wired/Wi-Fi labeling, current connection IP visibility, Web Worker execution, HTML/PNG/Markdown IT diagnostic report export, local-throttled maintenance self-tests, a desktop one-screen dashboard, Admin Console controls, local production health, OctoPulse visibility, and repo-visible reusable documentation.
latest_summary: Added a Konami-code (up up down down left right left right B A) easter egg that toggles a cosmetic NES retro theme across all pages including /admin, persisted in localStorage; bundled the Press Start 2P pixel font locally. Recoloured the theme after The Legend of Zelda (NES) — black/gold/green/parchment — and fixed an unreadable white-on-white CURRENT STATUS panel (.stage-copy and other light surfaces were not overridden).
next_action: Review the uncommitted NES easter-egg changes on branch claude/brave-chatterjee-c02fb5 and commit/push when ready.

last_commands: Playwright: press up up down down left right left right b a on / and /admin
verification.notes: Typecheck and full Vitest suite (105 tests, incl. new konami-code.test.ts) passed. Drove the Vite UI with Playwright: the Konami sequence on / added the retro-nes class, set localStorage to '1', and switched body background to the NES palette with the Press Start 2P font; the theme survived a reload; pressing the sequence again removed the class and reset storage to '0'; the same sequence on /admin themed the admin console. Layout stayed intact (cosmetic-only). Console errors were only the unreachable remote VITE_API_BASE, unrelated to the theme.

attention: Git origin now points at https://git.insea.io/twn-general/ping-pong.git (moved from git@git.insea.io:lindav/ping-pong.git).
The local branch currently tracks origin/main.
The running service uses .env PORT=8200, not the README default 8080.

Stability grading now consumes Stable CV (post-IQR) instead of Raw CV; IQR outlier thresholds widened (Wired 8/15/25%, Wi-Fi 12/22/35%) to stop a single noisy sample from cascading a fast connection to poor.
Homepage modes now run 30s / 45s; total per-test data is roughly 50% larger than before.
Local throttled runs are maintenance checks only; a non-local intranet device test is still required to evaluate real network performance.

recent_changes.summary: Konami-code easter egg toggles a cosmetic retro theme (all pages incl. /admin, localStorage-persisted): konami-code.ts + useRetroTheme hook + konami-code.test.ts. Super Mario Bros (NES) palette (sky-blue bg, white panels, dark text, red/green/gold accents). For readability swapped font Press Start 2P -> VT323 (bundled), set size once on root (19px) and removed a compounding per-element em font-size bug; in retro mode the shell grows to content and scrolls so the larger font no longer overflows/overlaps the one-screen fit layout.
recent_changes.verification: npm run typecheck; npm test (105 passed); Playwright full-page screenshot on / confirms legible VT323 Mario layout with no card overlap

recent_changes.summary: Repointed git origin to https://git.insea.io/twn-general/ping-pong.git so the repo lives under the twn-general namespace. User manually pushed main to the new origin.
recent_changes.verification: git remote set-url origin ...; git remote -v; git fetch origin; git status (main in sync with origin/main)

recent_changes.summary: Synced the statistics whitepaper with shared usability-aware stability grading on Stable CV, refreshed 30s/45s test-mode mentions and example interpretations, and replaced history.md with a pointer to .ai/status.json.
recent_changes.verification: npm run typecheck; grep sweep for outdated wording; manual diff review

recent_changes.summary: Committed and pushed stability-grading loosening and Quick/Full duration extension; version bumped to 0.3.1.
recent_changes.verification: npm run typecheck; npm test (100 passed); npm run build; launchctl kickstart -k gui/$(id -u)/com.pingpong.speedtest; curl health; git push origin main

recent_changes.summary: Wired and Unknown now share the Wi-Fi-style single-weak-component leniency; P10<50 hard-poor rule only fires when other variability is present, so slow-but-steady links land on Speed instead of Stability.
recent_changes.verification: npm run typecheck; npm test (100 passed); npm run build; launchctl kickstart -k gui/$(id -u)/com.pingpong.speedtest; curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8200/api/health
